steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the size of the Massasoit NWR. The only note that directly states the refuge’s size is: It encompasses 184 acres. The correct answer must include this information.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘A protected natural area, the Massasoit NWR encompasses 184 acres of land in Massachusetts.’: Directly states the size (184 acres), fulfilling the goal. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘The Massasoit NWR is a protected natural area managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service, which limits human activities there.’: Covers management and human activity restrictions but omits any mention of size. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘The Massasoit NWR is a natural area in Massachusetts, home to the Plymouth red-bellied turtle.’: Mentions location and the endangered species but omits size entirely. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Home to the Plymouth red-bellied turtle, Massachusetts’s Massasoit NWR is managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service.’: Mentions management and the endangered species but does not indicate size. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
